title: Cpl Pandey GS Part 1, 2 , 3 And 4 Grammerly Reedited May 2020
creator: WignCommander Shashikant Oak
subject: Bhuj Earthquake
Gulan Ahmed Potter
Indian National Army
description: One doesn't have to have high rank. Even an inspired Corporal Can do wonders! Cpl Pandey GS is one such example, who entered in my AF days to stamp an everlasting imprint of his Determination and Humanity.
